name: HOME DEPOT, INC.
summary: Home Depot, Inc. is a home improvement retailer offering a broad range of products and services including building materials, home improvement products, lawn and garden items, and installation and professional services. The company serves both Do-It-Yourself (DIY) and Do-It-For-Me (DIFM) customers, as well as professional contractors (Pro customers), through its retail stores and interconnected digital platforms including Buy Online options for pickup, delivery, and ship-to-store.
